originalTitle: Nigerian president's rivals get major boost as political heavyweight joins fold
title: Nigerian president's rivals get major boost as political heavyweight joins fold
content: Rabiu Kwankwaso joins the ADC, a coalition poised to take on President Tinubu in the 2027 elections.

originalTitle: Three killed as unfinished building collapses on church service in Ghana
title: Three killed as unfinished building collapses on church service in Ghana
content: Locals say the structure, in a school complex, was in use despite lying unfinished for a number of years.

originalTitle: 'This is bigger than football' - DR Congo bid to end 52-year World Cup wait
title: 'This is bigger than football' - DR Congo bid to end 52-year World Cup wait
content: DR Congo face Jamaica in a World Cup play-off, hoping to reach the tournament for the first time since 1974, a campaign memorable for the wrong reasons.

originalTitle: US embassy reopens in Venezuela months after Maduro abduction
title: US embassy reopens in Venezuela months after Maduro abduction
content: The US has reopened its embassy in Venezuela, nearly three months after it abducted the former leader Nicolas Maduro.

originalTitle: Rubio denies US actions punitive, blames Cuba for economic failures
title: Rubio denies US actions punitive, blames Cuba for economic failures
content: In exclusive interview with Al Jazeera, the US secretary of state downplays US role in the island nation's fuel crisis.

originalTitle: What we know about attack on key Israeli oil refinery
title: What we know about attack on key Israeli oil refinery
content: Israeli authorities said they were containing a large fire at an oil refinery in Haifa after it was hit by debris.

originalTitle: Spain closes airspace to US aircraft involved in Iran war
title: Spain closes airspace to US aircraft involved in Iran war
content: It follows a decision by the Spanish government to deny the US use of the two jointly run military bases in Andalusia.

originalTitle: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
title: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
content: The tanker has reached Cuban waters just hours after Donald Trump said he had "no problem" with it.

originalTitle: Zelensky says allies asked him to scale back attacks on Russian energy
title: Zelensky says allies asked him to scale back attacks on Russian energy
content: Ukraine's president says partners asked if the attacks could be "reduced" as prices soar due to the Iran war.

originalTitle: De Zerbi in advanced talks to become Spurs manager
title: De Zerbi in advanced talks to become Spurs manager
content: Tottenham Hotspur enter into advanced talks with Roberto de Zerbi, with the former Brighton manager now willing to take charge immediately, according to sources.

originalTitle: How Sky can ignore limit on its TV picks & why fans are fed up
title: How Sky can ignore limit on its TV picks & why fans are fed up
content: Premier League games being moved to Friday or Monday are a headache for the fans of some clubs. Is the system fair, and how does it work for Sky?

originalTitle: Five Euro 2028 tickets 'cost same as World Cup parking space'
title: Five Euro 2028 tickets 'cost same as World Cup parking space'
content: Uefa is to expected to broadly freeze prices at Euro 2028 - meaning supporters would be able to buy five tickets for the cost of one parking space at a World Cup stadium this summer.
